The 3rd/4th place game is pointless really. So England & France should have some fun with it and just mess about for 90 minutes. They should reverse their squad and have Pickford up front and Kane in goal.

England captain Harry Kane has taken to social media to share his disappointment at his team's World Cup exit at the hands of Argentina, admitting the 2-1 defeat in Atlanta was 'hard to take'.  Bayern Munich striker Kane led England with distinction, scoring six goals at the tournament, but could do little to avert the late defeat against Lionel Messi's team on Wednesday.    'No words are big enough right now to overcome this empty feeling in the stomach,' he says. 'We were close, really close to another final but it wasn't enough.

The Foreign Office slipped out figures revealing the bumper package for the next three years, despite Downing Street's claim that it was doing 'everything possible' to deport Ahmed. He was released from prison last month after serving 14 years for a string of child sex offences, including rape, in Rochdale.

Husband had this in April. Went on holiday to Whitby, where we’d both had colds and were a bit tired. Walked our dogs a lot, but it was cold and windy. When we got home, hubby not feeling great. Checked his blood oxygen. Down at 92 but told me to stop fussing. Wasn’t until next day when he was utterly exhausted and struggling to breathe, would he accept something was wrong. By now his blood oxygen at 89. Called 111 and they sent ambulance. Put on oxygen immediately and taken to hosp. 4 litres of oxygen a minute did not touch things, until eventually steroids were given along with the antibiotics. 2 days in hospital. Has taken 3 months of recovery and now with community respiratory team. Blood oxygen gadget helped save him and we could see deterioration. Just needed him to listen to me sooner!!

I've been on mounjaro for sixteen months and used 10 different suppliers for cost reasons. I've saved a considerable sum as I stored quite a few pens before the Trump price rise in August 25 and made use of the golden dose for the last six pens. I have four months supply in my fridge now as I have found further competitive prices. I expect to be finished after my current stock and will switch to lower dose Mounjaro pills for maintenance. I've lost 8 stone so far and will fight to protect my weight loss. I qualified for an NHS prescription but the waiting list was likely to be a year or more and my health could not wait. It has still been an expensive process but worth it. No regrets. I hope those patients that desperately need help who cannot afford to pay get what is needed. It's a real game changer!

Twelve members of a group named Protect Our Postcode spent an hour cleaning the camp above Bournemouth beach in Dorset, accusing the council and police of doing 'nothing' about the eyesore. The illegal encampment situated on the cliffside consisted of an old tent, a picnic table, a barbecue, bedding, a three-seater sofa, two armchairs, and a generator. Britain's gardens are suffering from heat exhaustion and water rationing. My hanging baskets have withered, dead plants, some of my shrubs are wilting, and the patio plants are barely hanging on. Normally at this time of the years, my garden is indeed in full bloom, and it lasts until mid-October or beyond. This year even some nurseries are having to lay staff off due to plants withering before they are bought, or low demand due to the heat.

The TV horticulturist said flowers in the UK in August 'can give the Med a run for its money' and anyone who shuns the bright lights of Torremolinos and the Costa del Sol' during the school holidays will reap botanical rewards from their decision to stay home.
  • 8 comments

Scientists at Northwestern University have designed a drone that spins so fast it disappears before your eyes. Called the 'Phantom Twist', the drone spins up to 25 times every second, which is too fast for the human eye to see. While it isn't completely invisible, the drone is about 10 times less visually perceptible than a conventional quadcopter.

Nothing warms the heart like a happy beaver.

The fugitive rodent, named Steve McQueen for his escaping exploits, made multiple attempts to escape from his enclosure since arriving at Wallington in 2023. Rangers suspected that Steve had females on his mind, which caused him to make a cunning getaway on three separate occasions. Now he has left his life of crime behind after finding love at a new countryside home in Wales - where he has become a father for the first time.
